title: Add memory limit to clunger systemd unit

log.context: Add memory limit to clunger systemd unit

Done. Here's a summary:

**What was done:**

- Added `MemoryMax=512M` and `MemorySwapMax=0` to the `[Service]` section of `/home/clungus/.config/systemd/user/clunger.service`
- Reloaded systemd and restarted the service
- Service came up healthy: active/running, HTTP 200 on port 8081, currently using 53MB of its 512MB cap
- The unit file was not previously tracked in `claude-config`, so it was added there and committed/pushed to GitHub (`bigclungus/claude-config` @ `8a0a877`)
